text.title: persona-building Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for persona-building as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Persona with stock photo, alliterative name, and invented demographics not drawn from interviews.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Polished presentation signals quality but predicts nothing; invented detail justifies wrong decisions with false confidence.

failure-mode.description: Creating 5 or more personas before reaching traction.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Multiple personas at pre-traction stage fragment focus; start with one primary and expand only after traction confirms segment boundaries.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Personas frozen at founding data echo year-one assumptions in year-three decisions; require quarterly minor refresh and post-pivot major rebuild.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without defining who not to target, teams waste acquisition budget on high-churn, high-support-cost, price-sensitive users that fit no sustainable segment.
